case_title: MEHMET HARPUT et al VS. CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO-OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ZELA ROWLAND--CCSF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
